changes: Added custom tabs support for standard CRM checklists
Custom tabs appear alongside standard tabs in the sidebar with status dots
Added CustomTabManager for creating, editing, reordering, and deleting custom tabs
Custom tab fields reuse all 9 field types (text, table, file, select, etc.)
Custom tabs available in both editor and client views
Settings dialog and new checklist page support custom tab configuration
Fixed admin settings save silently failing due to missing version field
Channel changes (e.g. unchecking Messenger) now persist correctly to the database
Added required field validation for Template Name and Purpose in Messaging Templates
Add Template button is disabled until all existing templates have Name and Purpose filled
Added dedicated Email Subject Line field in the Email channel row of each template
Extracted subject lines from pre-populated email template bodies into the new Subject field
Added Email Subject column to Excel export
Fixed message templates showing all channels instead of only enabled ones
Old checklists now fall back to default channels instead of showing all
Improved form field visibility with stronger borders (#BDBDBD, 1.5px)
Added blue focus ring with glow effect for keyboard navigation
Improved placeholder text contrast to meet WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Added hover state feedback and depth shadow on all form inputs
Applied consistent styling to Select dropdowns and Textarea fields
Fixed navigation buttons showing 'Checklist not found' on editor routes
Added basePath to ChecklistContext for route-aware link building
Added logo size helper text below Company Logo field label
Added admin-only Campaign ID field visible in editor view only
Added Assigned Recruiters field with round robin note to Campaigns tab
Added helperText support to KeyValueForm component
Updated Excel export to include Campaign ID and Assigned Recruiters columns
Replaced role-based access control with shareable editor links
Each checklist gets an unguessable UUID editor token for link-based access
Added Copy Editor Link and Regenerate Token actions to admin dashboard
Editor link holders can edit one checklist without seeing admin pages
Removed user management page, roles, and assignment system
All logged-in users now have full admin access
Old /client/[slug] URLs redirect to new /editor/[token] routes
Added field-level merge for concurrent editing — two users editing different tabs no longer conflict
Per-field version tracking with automatic conflict detection on same-field edits
Richer conflict error messages that name the specific conflicting section
Added role-based access control with Admin, Editor, and Viewer roles
Editors and Viewers see only checklists assigned to them
Viewers get a read-only experience — no editing, no add/delete actions
Added User Management page for admins to create users and assign checklists
Role badge shown in header and user dropdown across admin dashboard
Added Admin Settings tab with 7 sections for internal CRM configuration
Admin-only tab visibility — hidden from clients, shown only to logged-in admins
Feature checkboxes section with 39 toggles and enabled counter
Business hours editor with day-of-week grid and time pickers
Employee Referral Program section with conditional field logic
Replaced horizontal wrapping nav with a compact 48px icon-only vertical sidebar
Added Radix tooltip labels appearing on hover to the right of each icon
Added left-border active indicator replacing bottom-border underline
Status dots repositioned to top-right corner of each icon
Section status legend (LegendBar) now scoped to main content area only
Added database index on clientName for faster admin search and sort
Added server-side pagination to admin checklist list (50 per page)
Removed unsafe-eval from Content Security Policy in production
Added URL and email validation to Company Info fields (website, privacy policy, Facebook)
Added validation field support to KeyValueForm component
Added 3-attempt exponential backoff retry on failed saves
Extracted SettingsDialog into a standalone reusable component
Added unsaved changes warning when navigating between tabs
Replaced yellow editable fields with standard white/gray/blue form inputs
Moved Description column to ⓘ inline tooltips next to field labels
Unified color system: blue-600 primary for table headers, tab underlines, and focus rings
Redesigned Welcome page with progress card, status chips, and CTA button
Fixed header bar: Export XLS is now primary blue, Saved is plain text, Admin link higher contrast
Applied consistent typography scale across all section headings and tables
Updated reference tables (Role Reference, Campaign Type Reference) with consistent styling
Added Previous button to all section footers; last section shows Complete Checklist
View Example rows now have animated chevron, Eye icon, and clear hover state
Replaced sidebar navigation with a horizontal wrapping top nav bar
Status dots moved inline before each tab label
Added mobile drawer nav triggered by active tab name button
Added persistent LegendBar below the nav for section status reference
Matched Upload CSV button styling to Download CSV for equal visual weight
Improved sidebar section status dots with 3-state indicators and group dividers
Added section completion glow animation on status dot
Improved section header styling with left border accent
Improved subsection labels with divider-rule pattern
Improved sample rows with left border accent and badge label
Improved action icon hit targets and hover states
Improved CSV download button with brand color styling
Added localStorage persistence to Welcome page info cards
Tables now start empty instead of with a blank placeholder row
Improved expand/collapse chevron hit targets in expandable tables
Added 'Continue to next section' footer button on all content sections
Improved ExampleHint accordions start collapsed by default
Fixed contrast issues across section headers and table elements
Added sticky admin header with Talkpush wordmark and logout
Added collapsible sidebar navigation (desktop)
Added delete confirmation dialog to prevent accidental data loss
Made full table rows clickable with smooth hover transition
Replaced absolute dates with relative timestamps (hover for full date)
Added sortable Client, Created, and Updated columns
Added visual separator between safe actions and delete button
Added 5-second undo window after deleting a checklist
Improved column headers with uppercase, spaced styling
Added Status column placeholder for future completion tracking
Updated brand teal (#007A6A) across all UI — passes WCAG AA
Moved slug to secondary line under client name
Added footer with row count and app version
Improved empty states with icon and contextual messaging
Search input hidden until 8+ checklists exist
Upgraded card shadow and page title size
Added AI call voice selection toggle per checklist
Added PWA support for Add to Home Screen on iOS and Android
Added About tab with version history
Added per-field sample column and pinned sample row to all sheets
Reverted SSL config to fix managed DB connection on Vercel
Applied Talkpush Design System brand tokens and color cleanup
Merged Read Me tab into Welcome tab
Expanded table rows by default for better desktop real estate
Added progress bar, tooltips, placeholders, and UX polish
Improved table row hover, detail panel labels, and input visibility
Security hardening, performance improvements, and Supabase storage prep
Added Company Details, Facebook, and Branding fields to Company Information
Added file upload for branding assets using Supabase Storage
Added expandable row detail for compact table UX
Improved UI consistency with taller inputs and wider columns
Initial production deployment with 14-tab configuration checklist
Admin dashboard with checklist management and Excel import/export
AI Call tab with voice preview and gender-filtered audio playback
Communication channels selector for messaging and AI Call visibility
Pre-populated messaging templates for email, SMS, WhatsApp, and Messenger
Security hardening, error handling, and auto-save with data safety
